category_sources: source_facts.description says it exports Slack data without admin privileges; official README describes archiving/exporting Slack messages, users, channels, files, and emojis.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses “Slack Dumper”; source_facts.name is slackdump.
docs_sources: Official repository README links to the Slackdump User Guide under the repo doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rusq/slackdump, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe Slack export/archive modes and command-line usage.
